moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins its 2026 edition at the All England Club in London on Monday.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches on Monday. Who are you backing for the title this year?

angles.name: UK's Grand Slam
angles.copy: It's almost time for the grass court action! Wimbledon begins Monday, bringing the world's best tennis to London. Let's hope for some British success!

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Begins
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, the world's most famous cycling race, commences on Saturday, July 4th, starting in Barcelona.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: The ultimate test of endurance begins! The Tour de France kicks off this Saturday from Barcelona. Who's your pick for the yellow jersey?

angles.name: Cycling Fever
angles.copy: Get ready for three weeks of gruelling climbs and thrilling sprints! The Tour de France starts July 4th. Will you be tuning in?

moments.title: Glastonbury Fallow Year Confirmed
moments.blurb: Glastonbury Festival is taking its traditional 'fallow year' in 2026, meaning there will be no festival at Worthy Farm this year, with its return scheduled for 2027.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: Missing the Pyramid Stage already? Reminder: Glastonbury is taking its scheduled fallow year in 2026. Start planning for 2027 now!

angles.name: Fallow Year
angles.copy: Worthy Farm is resting up! There's no Glastonbury Festival this year as it's a fallow year. Which acts are you hoping to see in 2027?

moments.title: Everywhere at Once Festival
moments.blurb: The 'Everywhere at Once' festival is happening this weekend (June 26-28), bringing live music to hundreds of grassroots venues across the UK as an alternative to Glastonbury.

angles.name: Grassroots Gigs
angles.copy: No Glastonbury? No problem! The 'Everywhere at Once' festival is celebrating live music in hundreds of grassroots venues across the UK this weekend!

angles.name: Support Local Venues
angles.copy: This weekend, get out and support your local music scene! The 'Everywhere at Once' festival is bringing gigs to grassroots venues nationwide. Find a show near you!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival continues
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival continues this weekend with Pete Tong Ibiza Classics (June 27), Alanis Morissette (June 28), Teddy Swims (June 30), Katy Perry (July 1), and Michael Bublé (July 4).

angles.name: Palace Party
angles.copy: What a lineup! Blenheim Palace Festival is bringing huge names to Oxfordshire this weekend, from Pete Tong to Alanis Morissette. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace is the place to be for live music this weekend! Catch Pete Tong, Alanis Morissette, Teddy Swims and more. Epic summer vibes guaranteed!

moments.title: Cardiff Castle hosts major gigs
moments.blurb: Cardiff Castle is hosting a series of major concerts this week, including Blackbird Festival 2026 with Alter Bridge and Skindred on Saturday, June 27th, and Katy Perry on June 30th.

angles.name: Cardiff Rock
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is rocking this weekend! Blackbird Festival takes over tomorrow with Alter Bridge and Skindred. Who's heading down?

angles.name: Katy in the Castle
angles.copy: Get ready for a pop extravaganza! Katy Perry plays Cardiff Castle on Tuesday. It's going to be an unforgettable night in the capital!

moments.title: Blackweir Live in Cardiff continues
moments.blurb: Blackweir Live in Bute Park, Cardiff, features Teddy Swims tonight, June 26th, and Lewis Capaldi on June 30th and July 1st.

angles.name: Tonight in Cardiff
angles.copy: Teddy Swims is at Blackweir Live in Bute Park tonight! Perfect summer evening for some incredible tunes. Are you there?

angles.name: Capaldi in the Park
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi fans, get ready! He's at Blackweir Live in Cardiff on June 30th and July 1st. Grab your tickets for a night of emotional anthems!

moments.title: Live at Powderham continues near Exeter
moments.blurb: TK Maxx Presents Live at Powderham, near Exeter, continues this weekend with Teddy Swims tonight, June 26th, and Alanis Morissette on Saturday, June 27th.

angles.name: Powderham Sounds
angles.copy: Big weekend of music at Powderham Castle! Teddy Swims tonight and Alanis Morissette tomorrow. Who's heading to the stunning Devon setting?

angles.name: Devon Gigs
angles.copy: Two huge acts in Devon this weekend! Teddy Swims and Alanis Morissette are playing Live at Powderham. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Exeter's 'June Boom' continues
moments.blurb: Exeter's month-long 'June Boom' celebration of arts, culture, and entertainment is still in full swing with various events across the city.

angles.name: Exeter Culture
angles.copy: The 'June Boom' is still bringing vibrant arts, culture, and entertainment to Exeter! Check out what's happening this weekend across the city.

angles.name: City Alive
angles.copy: Exeter is buzzing with 'June Boom' events! From exhibitions to performances, there's still plenty to explore before the month is out.

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The UK Official Singles Chart Top 40 for the week ending June 27, 2026, sees new entries from Olivia Rodrigo, LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE, and Shakira & Burna Boy, alongside re-entries for 'Three Lions' and 'Waka Waka'.

angles.name: New Chart Hits
angles.copy: Fresh tracks hitting the Official Singles Chart Top 40 this week! New entries from Olivia Rodrigo and Shakira & Burna Boy. What's your favourite new tune?

angles.name: Summer Anthems
angles.copy: Football anthems 'Three Lions' and 'Waka Waka' are back in the Top 40! Plus new music from LE SSERAFIM x ILLIT x KATSEYE. Get the full rundown!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to the incredible Ariana Grande today! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to one of pop's biggest voices, Ariana Grande, turning 33 today! Celebrate with her biggest hits on Nation Hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Chris Isaak
moments.blurb: American rockabilly and crooner icon Chris Isaak celebrates his 70th birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the legendary Chris Isaak today! Still giving us 'Wicked Game' vibes. Tune in for his classics.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Crooner
angles.copy: Sending birthday wishes to the one and only Chris Isaak, who turns 70 today! A true icon of cool. What's your favourite of his tracks?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jones
moments.blurb: The Clash guitarist and co-founder Mick Jones celebrates his 71st birthday today, June 26th.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to the legendary Mick Jones of The Clash! The man behind some of punk's greatest riffs. What's your favourite Clash song?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: From 'London Calling' to Big Audio Dynamite, Happy Birthday to the incredible Mick Jones, turning 71 today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cheryl Ann Tweedy
moments.blurb: Pop star and Girls Aloud member Cheryl Ann Tweedy celebrates her 43rd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Girls Aloud Star
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Cheryl Ann Tweedy turns 43 on Sunday. What's your favourite Girls Aloud or solo hit?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a future Happy 43rd Birthday to the fabulous Cheryl Ann Tweedy! Celebrate with her biggest tracks on Nation Hits.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Hal Lindes
moments.blurb: Former Dire Straits guitarist Hal Lindes celebrates his 73rd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Dire Straits Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to Hal Lindes, who played guitar on some of Dire Straits' biggest hits! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Mark Knopfler wasn't the only guitar hero! Wishing a Happy Birthday to Dire Straits' Hal Lindes, turning 73 on Sunday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Deborah Harry
moments.blurb: Blondie's iconic lead singer Deborah Harry celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: She's still got it! Wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Deborah Harry of Blondie on Wednesday!

angles.name: Rock Goddess
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', Happy Birthday to the incredible Deborah Harry, who turns 81 on July 1st!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Genius
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the synth-pop maestro Vince Clarke! Responsible for hits from Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: From 'Just Can't Get Enough' to 'A Little Respect', Happy Birthday to Vince Clarke, turning 66 on Friday! Tune into Nation 80s for his iconic sound.
